creator: slaven@rezic.de
text:
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.ORG> writes:

> Maintainer of astro/merkaartor,
>
> Please note that PR ports/154559 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/154559

The patch looks fine to me.

That said, I think it's better if somebody else takes maintenance care
of the port then to wait for maintainer timeouts. Maybe Oliver
Heesakkers is interested, as he submitted the last two updates?

Regards,
    Slaven

-- 
Slaven Rezic - slaven <at> rezic <dot> de

    Berlin Perl Mongers - http://berlin.pm.org
